[Sun 2026-04-05 06:10 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: # ULTRAPLAN: Complete MAGI Web App Redesign — Zero Bug Tolerance

You have up to 30 minutes to think deeply about this task. Do NOT execute anything.
Your job is to produce a comprehensive, actionable plan that another team of 4 agents will execute.

## Task
Lucy wants to completely redesign/overhaul the MAGI web application to be significantly better. The redesign must be so thorough that Lucy encounters ZERO bugs when using it. Every edge case, every mobile interaction, every API failure state must be handled.

## What is MAGI?
MAGI is a custom-built web dashboard for managing a Council of 12 AI agents. It runs on a DigitalOcean VPS (8GB RAM, 4vCPU). Stack: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS frontend (no React/build tools), Fastify backend, WebSocket for real-time chat.

## Current Architecture

### Frontend (~/magi-v2/frontend/) — 18 pages, all vanilla HTML
Each page is a self-contained HTML file with inline CSS/JS. No shared component system.

Pages by size (lines):
- settings: 970 lines
- chat: 847 lines (WebSocket-based, real-time)
- roundtable: 708 lines
- leads: 668 lines
- vault: 560 lines
- icat: 494 lines
- analytics: 412 lines
- knowledge: 404 lines
- tasks: 354 lines
- mission: 343 lines
- monitor: 341 lines
- files: 334 lines
- dashboard: 241 lines (main landing/app launcher)
- pipeline: 160 lines
- broadcast: 135 lines
- reports: 120 lines
- notifications: 83 lines
- login: 71 lines

Shared assets: marked.min.js, highlight.min.js, atom-one-dark.min.css, Inter font woff2 files

### Backend (~/magi-v2/backend/server.js) — 2,273 lines
Fastify + WebSocket. Key API groups:
- /api/auth/* — login, logout, session
- /api/sessions/* — chat sessions CRUD + messaging
- /api/agents — agent listing
- /api/vault/* — notes, graph, search (Obsidian-like)
- /api/files/* — VPS file manager
- /api/analytics/* — usage stats, daily, events
- /api/monitor/* — agent status, routing, memory
- /api/tasks/* — kanban board
- /api/leads/* — 158K business leads, map, export
- /api/icat/* — contacts, templates, auto-rules
- /api/knowledge-base/* — research archive
- /api/roundtable/* — multi-agent discussions
- /api/notifications — alerts
- /api/whatsapp/send — messaging
- /ws/chat — WebSocket for real-time

### Legacy Backend (~/council-room/backend/server.js) — 6,409 lines
Original council-room with Telegram bot, agent souls, cron jobs. Still runs alongside MAGI v2.
Separate pages served by Caddy: it-support, admin, voice-call, pixel-office, etc.

### Infrastructure
- Caddy reverse proxy (magi.64-227-110-70.sslip.io)
- PM2 process management
- CouchDB for Obsidian LiveSync
- Docker for some services
- All on single VPS

### Current Design System
- Dark theme throughout
- CSS vars: --bg:#060a14, --primary:#34d399, --accent:#6366f1
- Glass morphism effects (backdrop-filter, subtle borders)
- Inter font family
- Lucide icons
- JetBrains Mono for code
- Responsive but inconsistent across pages

### Dashboard (Landing)
App launcher pattern — grid of cards linking to each sub-app. Gradient MAGI logo, status pill, Lucide icons.

### Chat (Most Complex Page — 847 lines)
WebSocket real-time chat. Features: sidebar with sessions, markdown rendering, code highlighting, agent picker, typing indicators, session management. CSS vars differ slightly from dashboard.

## Known Issues / Pain Points
1. No shared component system — every page reimplements common UI (nav, sidebar, cards, modals)
2. CSS variables inconsistent between pages (some use --bg:#0a0e1a, some --bg:#060a14)
3. No global navigation — each page is isolated, you navigate via dashboard
4. Mobile experience varies per page
5. No dark/light mode toggle (all dark)
6. No loading states for many API calls
7. Error handling inconsistent — some pages show toast, some show nothing
8. No offline/reconnect handling for WebSocket
9. Code duplication — auth check, API calls, toast, markdown rendering duplicated everywhere
10. Some pages are stubs (notifications: 83 lines, login: 71 lines)

## Your Output Must Include

### 1. Problem Analysis
- What exactly needs fixing (categorized: UX, DX, performance, reliability, visual)
- Current state assessment per page
- Critical bugs/gaps that WILL cause issues
- What's actually working well (keep these)

### 2. Architecture Decision: Shared Component System
Should we:
A) Keep vanilla HTML but extract shared CSS/JS into importable modules
B) Adopt a micro-framework (Alpine.js, Petite-Vue, Lit)
C) Full React/Vue/Svelte rewrite
D) Something else

Evaluate each with pros/cons/effort. Must stay deployable on this VPS with no build pipeline.

### 3. Design System Specification
- Unified CSS variable set (one source of truth)
- Typography scale
- Spacing system
- Color palette (primary, accent, semantic colors)
- Component library (buttons, cards, inputs, modals, toasts, tables, badges)
- Animation/transition standards
- Responsive breakpoints
- Dark mode tokens (extensible to light mode later)

### 4. Shared Infrastructure
- Global navigation (sidebar? top bar? both?)
- Authentication wrapper
- API client (fetch wrapper with auth, error handling, retry)
- WebSocket manager (reconnect, heartbeat)
- Toast/notification system
- Loading states
- Error boundaries
- Markdown renderer (shared instance)
- Code highlighting (shared)

### 5. Page-by-Page Redesign Plan
For EACH of the 18 pages:
- Current state (what works, what's broken)
- Proposed changes
- Priority (P0 = critical, P1 = important, P2 = nice-to-have)
- Estimated effort (hours)
- Dependencies on shared infrastructure
- Edge cases to handle
- Mobile-specific considerations

### 6. Bug Prevention Checklist
For EVERY page, verify:
- [ ] Loading states for ALL async operations
- [ ] Error states for ALL API calls (network error, 401, 500)
- [ ] Empty states (no data, first use)
- [ ] Mobile responsive (320px to 1920px)
- [ ] Touch targets ≥ 44px on mobile
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] WebSocket reconnection (if applicable)
- [ ] Auth redirect on 401
- [ ] Input validation
- [ ] XSS prevention (HTML escaping)
- [ ] Memory leaks (intervals, event listeners cleaned up)
- [ ] Back button works correctly
- [ ] Scroll position preserved where expected
- [ ] Copy/paste works for code blocks
- [ ] Long text truncation with tooltip

### 7. Execution Plan (4 Parallel Agents)
Break the work into 4 parallel streams that can be executed by 4 sub-agents simultaneously:
- Agent 1: ???
- Agent 2: ???
- Agent 3: ???
- Agent 4: ???

Define clear boundaries so agents don't conflict (no two agents editing the same file simultaneously).
Define the ORDER of execution (what must be done first, what can be parallel).

### 8. Risk Mitigation
- What could go wrong during redesign?
- How to test each page after changes?
- Rollback plan if something breaks?
- How to avoid breaking the backend?

### 9. Open Questions
- What needs Lucy's input before execution?
- Design preferences not yet known?
- Feature additions vs pure redesign?

## Rules
- DO NOT execute any code or make any changes
- DO NOT use tools that modify files (write, edit, exec)
- You MAY use read, web_search, web_fetch to gather information
- Focus on THINKING, not DOING
- Be thorough — this plan will be executed by 4 agents simultaneously
- State assumptions explicitly
- ZERO BUG TOLERANCE — think through every edge case
- Consider this VPS has 8GB RAM — no heavy build tools

## Context Files to Read
Read these files to understand the current state:
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/dashboard/index.html (landing page pattern)
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/chat/index.html (most complex page)
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/settings/index.html (largest page)
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/roundtable/index.html (multi-agent feature)
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/vault/index.html (Obsidian-like notes)
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/login/index.html (auth flow)
- ~/magi-v2/frontend/monitor/index.html (agent status)
- ~/magi-v2/backend/server.js (full backend)
- /etc/caddy/Caddyfile (routing)

Read as many as you can within your time budget. The more context, the better the plan.
I'll start by reading all the key source files to understand the current state thoroughly before producing the plan.

MAGI
Your apps, one place.
Checking...

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0">
<title>MAGI — Council Canvas</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/atom-one-dark.min.css">
<style>
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:300;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-300.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:400;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-400.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:500;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-500.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:600;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-600.woff2') format('woff2')}
@font-face{font-family:'Inter';font-weight:700;src:url('/shared/fonts/inter-700.woff2') format('woff2')}

:root{
  --bg:#060a14;
  --bg2:#0c1020;
  --surface:rgba(12,16,32,.82);
  --glass:rgba(16,22,42,.55);
  --glass-border:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  --text:#F0F4FA;
  --text2:#8B9CC0;
  --text3:#5A6A8A;
  --text4:#2E3B55;
  --primary:#34D399;
  --primary-glow:rgba(52,211,153,.15);
  --accent:#6366F1;
  --accent2:#818CF8;
  --accent-glow:rgba(99,102,241,.12);
  --warn:#FBBF24;
  --danger:#F87171;
  --r:10px;
  --r-lg:14px;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
  --dur:180ms;
  --sidebar-w:260px;
  --noise:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.02'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
::selection{background:rgba(99,102,241,.25);color:#fff}

/* ═══ LAYOUT ═══ */
.app{display:flex;height:100dvh;position:relative}
.app::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:radial-gradient(800px 600px at 5% 10%,rgba(99,102,241,.06) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(600px 600px at 95% 80%,rgba(139,92,246,.04) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(400px 400px at 40% 40%,rgba(52,211,153,.03) 0%,transparent 60%)}
.app::after{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:var(--noise);background-repeat:repeat;opacity:.6}

/* ═══ SIDEBAR ═══ */
.sidebar{width:var(--sidebar-w);height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--glass-border);z-index:5;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;transition:margin-left .25s var(--ease)}
.sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:calc(var(--sidebar-w) * -1)}

.sb-header{padding:14px 16px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.sb-logo{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.sb-tag{font-size:8px;color:var(--text4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-top:2px}
.sb-toggle{margin-left:auto;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text3);border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.sb-toggle:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text2)}

.sb-new{margin:10px 12px;padding:11px;border:1px dashed rgba(99,102,241,.2);border-radius:var(--r);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.04),rgba(52,211,153,.03));color:var(--accent2);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s var(--ease);text-align:center;letter-spacing:.3px}
.sb-new:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.1),rgba(52,211,153,.06));border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.3);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,.08)}

.sb-section{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text4);padding:12px 16px 4px}

.sb-sessions{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px 8px;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.1) transparent}
.sb-sessions::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
.sb-sessions::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);border-radius:999px}

.sb-sess{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--dur);margin-bottom:2px;border:1px solid transparent}
.sb-sess:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.sb-sess.active{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}
.sb-sess-icon{font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.sb-sess-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.sb-sess-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--text4);margin-top:1px}
.sb-sess-del{opacity:0;width:20px;height:20px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text4);cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--dur);flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess:hover .sb-sess-del{opacity:1}
.sb-sess-del:hover{background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--danger)}

/* Sidebar footer */
.sb-footer{padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;gap:6px}
.sb-foot-btn{flex:1;padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text3);border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.sb-foot-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);color:var(--text2)}

/* ═══ MAIN AREA ═══ */
.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;z-index:1;min-width:0}

/* Top bar */
.topbar{height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(10,14,28,.5);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(16px)}
.tb-hamburger{width:30px;height:30px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:var(--r);transition:all var(--dur)}
.tb-hamburger:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text2)}
.tb-hamburger.hidden{display:none}
.tb-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.tb-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)}
.tb-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--danger);transition:background .4s;box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--danger)}
.tb-dot.ok{background:var(--primary);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--primary-glow)}
.tb-dot.connecting{background:var(--warn);animation:pulse 1.2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{50%{opacity:.3}}

/* Help button */
.tb-help{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:var(--text3);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--dur)}
.tb-help:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);color:var(--accent2);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.15)}

/* Help panel */
.help-panel{position:fixed;top:44px;right:0;width:min(380px,100vw);height:calc(100vh - 44px);background:rgba(10,14,28,.95);border-left:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);z-index:50;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .25s var(--ease);scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.1) transparent}
.help-panel.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.help-panel::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
.help-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.12);border-radius:999px}
.help-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.help-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text4);margin:18px 0 8px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.help-card{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.015);margin-bottom:6px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.help-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.help-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.help-card-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px currentColor}
.help-card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
.help-card-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)}
.help-card-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.5}
.help-feature{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.help-feature:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.help-feature-icon{font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;width:28px;text-align:center}
.help-feature-info{flex:1}
.help-feature-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px}
.help-feature-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);line-height:1.5}

/* ═══ CHAT AREA ═══ */
.chat-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;padding-bottom:160px;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.08) transparent}
.chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}
.chat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);border-radius:999px}
.cards-area{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}

/* Council Visualizer */
.council-viz{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 8px;padding:12px 0;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.viz-strip{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:0 8px}
.viz-agent{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--ease);padding:4px 6px;border-radius:10px;min-width:52px}
.viz-agent:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.viz-agent.speaking{transform:scale(1.08)}
.viz-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;position:relative;transition:all .3s var(--ease);border:2px solid transparent}
.viz-avatar::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .3s;animation:none}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(52,211,153,.3)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar::after{border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.3);animation:vizPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-avatar{border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.4);animation:vizBreathe 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-name{font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;max-width:52px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;transition:color .3s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-name{color:var(--accent)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-name{color:var(--warn)}
.viz-status{position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--bg);background:var(--text3)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-status{background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(52,211,153,.5)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-status{background:var(--warn)}
.viz-bubble{position:absolute;top:-24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(14,18,36,.9);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:8px;color:var(--text2);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-bubble,.viz-agent.thinking .viz-bubble{opacity:1}
@keyframes vizPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.6}50%{transform:scale(1.15);opacity:0}}
@keyframes vizBreathe{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.04)}}

/* Welcome screen */
.welcome{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:60vh;text-align:center;padding:40px 20px}
.welcome h1{font-size:32px;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--accent2),#A78BFA);background-size:200% auto;-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:8px;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{to{background-position:200% center}}
.welcome p{color:var(--text3);font-size:14px;max-width:420px;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:24px}
.welcome-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;max-width:520px;width:100%}
.welcome-card{padding:14px 12px;border-radius:var(--r-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.015);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s var(--ease)}
.welcome-card:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.welcome-card .wc-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:6px}
.welcome-card .wc-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
.welcome-card .wc-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.4}

/* ═══ CARDS ═══ */
.card{background:rgba(12,16,32,.45);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r-lg);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.03) inset;overflow:hidden;transition:all .2s var(--ease);animation:cardIn .3s var(--ease)}
.card:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.09)}
@keyframes cardIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

.card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.02),transparent)}
.card-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 8px currentColor}
.card-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2px}
.card-tag{font-size:8px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);color:var(--accent2);font-weight:600}
.card-time{font-size:9px;color:var(--text4);margin-left:auto}
.card-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-left:8px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s}
.card:hover .card-actions{opacity:1}
.card-act{padding:3px 8px;font-size:9px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all var(--dur)}
.card-act:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);color:var(--accent2)}

.card-body{padding:12px 16px;font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--text)}
.card-body.streaming{border-left:2px solid var(--accent);margin-left:-1px;animation:streamGlow 2s infinite}
@keyframes streamGlow{0%,100%{border-color:var(--accent)}50%{border-color:var(--primary)}}

/* User card */
.card.user{background:rgba(99,102,241,.04);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.08)}
.card.user .card-head{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(99,102,241,.05),transparent)}

/* Markdown in cards */
.card-body pre{background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px;overflow-x:auto;margin:8px 0;font-size:12px;position:relative}
.card-body code{font-family:'SF Mono','JetBrains Mono',Consolas,monospace;font-size:.88em}
.card-body :not(pre)>code{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px}
.card-body p{margin:4px 0}.card-body p:first-child{margin-top:0}.card-body p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.card-body table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;margin:6px 0;font-size:12px}
.card-body th,.card-body td{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:5px 8px;text-align:left}
.card-body th{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);font-weight:600;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)}
.card-body ul,.card-body ol{margin:4px 0;padding-left:20px}
.card-body blockquote{border-left:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-left:10px;color:var(--text2);margin:6px 0;font-style:italic}
.card-body h1,.card-body h2,.card-body h3{margin:10px 0 4px;font-weight:600}
.card-body h1{font-size:18px}.card-body h2{font-size:16px}.card-body h3{font-size:14px}
.card-body a{color:var(--accent2);text-decoration:none}
.card-body strong{font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
.cc{position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s}
pre:hover .cc{opacity:1}.cc:hover{color:var(--text);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}

/* Visual frame */
.visual-frame{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);margin-top:8px;background:#1a1a2e;overflow:hidden}
.visual-frame iframe{width:100%;height:400px;border:none}
.visual-frame .vf-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.visual-frame .vf-bar span{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.visual-frame .vf-bar a{font-size:9px;color:var(--primary);text-decoration:none}
.visual-loading{padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite}

/* System message */
.sys-msg{text-align:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text4);padding:8px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px}
.sys-msg::before,.sys-msg::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);max-width:80px}

/* ═══ BOTTOM BAR ═══ */
.bottom-wrap{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:var(--sidebar-w);right:0;z-index:20;pointer-events:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:0 16px 14px;transition:left .25s var(--ease)}
.bottom-wrap.full{left:0}

.chat-bar{pointer-events:all;width:min(720px,100%);background:rgba(14,18,36,.7);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:16px;backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(1.2);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05) inset;transition:all .25s var(--ease)}
.chat-bar:focus-within{border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.18);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,.05),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05) inset}

.cb-input{width:100%;background:none;border:none;padding:16px 18px 6px;color:var(--text);font-size:15px;font-family:inherit;resize:none;outline:none;min-height:48px;max-height:120px;line-height:1.5}
.cb-input::placeholder{color:var(--text4);font-weight:300}

.cb-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:6px 10px 10px;gap:6px}
.cb-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.cb-right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}

/* Mode/Agent selector pill */
.mode-select{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:5px 11px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all var(--dur);position:relative}
.mode-select:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);color:var(--accent2);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}
.mode-select .ms-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}

/* Tool pills */
.tool-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all var(--dur)}
.tool-pill:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);color:var(--accent2);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}

/* Send/Stop */
.cb-send{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:var(--r);border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),#10B981);color:var(--bg);font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;transition:all var(--dur) var(--ease);box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(52,211,153,.15)}
.cb-send:hover:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(52,211,153,.25)}
.cb-send:disabled{opacity:.15;cursor:default;box-shadow:none}
.cb-stop{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,.15);background:rgba(248,113,113,.04);color:var(--danger);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--dur)}
.cb-stop.show{display:flex}

/* ═══ DROPDOWNS ═══ */
.dropdown{position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 8px);left:0;min-width:340px;max-height:420px;background:rgba(14,18,36,.92);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--r-lg);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.04) inset;backdrop-filter:blur(28px);display:none;z-index:40;overflow:hidden;display:none;flex-direction:column}
.dropdown.show{display:flex;animation:dropIn .2s var(--ease)}
@keyframes dropIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
/* Sticky top section (modes) */
.dd-sticky{padding:6px;flex-shrink:0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
/* Scrollable agent list */
.dd-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(99,102,241,.1) transparent}
.dd-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
.dd-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(99,102,241,.12);border-radius:999px}

.dd-header{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text4);padding:6px 8px 2px}
.dd-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--dur)}
.dd-item:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08)}
.dd-item.active{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,.12) inset}
.dd-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px currentColor}
.dd-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.dd-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3)}
.dd-search{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:var(--r);padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;outline:none;margin-bottom:4px}
.dd-search:focus{border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.2)}
.dd-sep{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);margin:4px 0}

/* Agent checkboxes in dropdown */
.dd-agent-check{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--dur);font-size:11px}
.dd-agent-check:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.dd-agent-check input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--primary);cursor:pointer;width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.dd-agent-check .ac-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.dd-agent-check .ac-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--text);min-width:68px;display:inline-block}
.dd-agent-check .ac-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);opacity:.7}
.dd-select-all{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--dur)}
.dd-select-all:hover{color:var(--text)}

/* ═══ SETTINGS PANEL ═══ */
.settings-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(2,6,23,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);z-index:100;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.settings-overlay.show{display:flex}
.settings-panel{background:rgba(14,18,36,.95);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:16px;width:min(560px,92vw);max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);animation:cardIn .25s var(--ease)}
.settings-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.settings-close{margin-left:auto;width:28px;height:28px;border:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text3);border-radius:var(--r);cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--dur)}
.settings-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:var(--text)}
.settings-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);margin:16px 0 8px}
.settings-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0}
.settings-row label{width:70px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0}
.settings-row input[type=range]{flex:1;accent-color:var(--primary);cursor:pointer}
.settings-row .val{width:24px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-align:center}
.preset-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(110px,1fr));gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px}
.preset-card{padding:10px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all var(--dur)}
.preset-card:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06)}
.preset-card.active{border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.3);background:rgba(52,211,153,.06)}
.preset-card .pc-icon{font-size:18px}
.preset-card .pc-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px}
.preset-card .pc-desc{font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
.settings-btn{width:100%;padding:10px;border:none;border-radius:var(--r);background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),#10B981);color:var(--bg);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;margin-top:12px;transition:all var(--dur)}
.settings-btn:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(52,211,153,.2)}

/* ═══ TOAST ═══ */
.toast{position:fixed;top:14px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-10px);padding:8px 18px;background:rgba(14,18,36,.9);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:var(--r-lg);font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);z-index:999;opacity:0;transition:all .3s var(--ease);pointer-events:none;font-weight:500}
.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}

/* ═══ RESPONSIVE ═══ */
@media(max-width:768px){
  .sidebar{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;z-index:50;box-shadow:4px 0 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
  .sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:calc(var(--sidebar-w) * -1)}
  .bottom-wrap{left:0!important}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <!-- Sidebar -->
  <div class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-header">
      <a href="/dashboard/" style="text-decoration:none"><div class="sb-logo">MAGI</div><div class="sb-tag">Council Canvas</div></a>
      <button class="sb-toggle" id="sbToggle" onclick="toggleSidebar()">◀</button>
    </div>
    <button class="sb-new" onclick="newSession()">+ New Session</button>
    <div class="sb-section">Sessions</div>
    <div class="sb-sessions" id="sessionList"></div>
    <div class="sb-footer">
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="openSettings()">⚙️ Settings</button>
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="forkSession()">🌀 Fork</button>
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="saveSessionToObsidian()">📝 Obsidian</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main -->
  <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
      <button class="tb-hamburger" id="tbHamburger" onclick="toggleSidebar()">☰</button>
      <span class="tb-title" id="tbTitle">New Session</span>
      <div class="tb-pill"><div class="tb-dot" id="wsDot"></div><span id="wsLabel">Connecting</span></div>
      <button class="tb-help" onclick="toggleHelp()" title="Guide">?</button>
    </div>

    <div class="chat-scroll" id="chatScroll">
      <!-- Council Visualizer -->
      <div class="council-viz" id="councilViz">
        <div class="viz-strip" id="vizStrip"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="welcome" id="welcome">
        <h1>MAGI Council</h1>
        <p>12 AI agents organized in 5 layers — Intelligence, Strategy, Guard Rails, Blueprint, and Core Council. Pick a mode and start asking.</p>
        <div class="welcome-grid">
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="pickMode('council');closeModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">🏛</div><div class="wc-name">Council</div><div class="wc-desc">Ask one agent</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="pickMode('roundtable');closeModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">🔮</div><div class="wc-name">Roundtable</div><div class="wc-desc">All agents debate</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="toggleModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">💬</div><div class="wc-name">Private</div><div class="wc-desc">1-on-1 with agent</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="promptVisual()"><div class="wc-icon">🎨</div><div class="wc-name">Visual</div><div class="wc-desc">Diagrams & charts</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="openSettings()"><div class="wc-icon">⚡</div><div class="wc-name">Intensity</div><div class="wc-desc">Control depth</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="toggleHelp()"><div class="wc-icon">📖</div><div class="wc-name">Guide</div><div class="wc-desc">Features & agents</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-area" id="cardsArea"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bottom bar -->
<div class="bottom-wrap" id="bottomWrap">
  <div class="chat-bar" id="chatBar">
    <textarea class="cb-input" id="inp" rows="1" placeholder="Ask the Council..." onkeydown="onKey(event)" oninput="autoGrow(this)"></textarea>
    <div class="cb-footer">
      <div class="cb-left">
        <div style="position:relative">
          <button class="mode-select" id="modeBtn" onclick="toggleModeDD()">
            <span class="ms-dot" id="modeDot" style="background:var(--primary)"></span>
            <span id="modeName">Council</span>
            <span style="font-size:8px;opacity:.5">▾</span>
          </button>
          <div class="dropdown" id="modeDD"></div>
        </div>
        <button class="tool-pill" onclick="promptVisual()">🎨 Visual</button>
        <button class="tool-pill" onclick="forkSession()">🌀 Fork</button>
      </div>
      <div class="cb-right">
        <button class="cb-stop" id="btnStop" onclick="doStop()">■</button>
        <button class="cb-send" id="btnSend" onclick="doSend()">↑</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Settings overlay -->
<div class="settings-overlay" id="settingsOverlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeSettings()">
  <div class="settings-panel">
    <div class="settings-title">⚙️ Settings <button class="settings-close" onclick="closeSettings()">×</button></div>

    <div class="settings-section">Presets</div>
    <div class="preset-grid" id="presetGrid"></div>

    <div class="settings-section">Agent Intensity</div>
    <div id="intAgents"></div>

    <div class="settings-section">Reasoning Mode</div>
    <div id="reasoningModes" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px">
      <button class="settings-btn" onclick="saveSettings()" style="flex:2">Save</button>
      <button class="settings-btn" onclick="clearCards()" style="flex:1;background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--danger)">🗑 Clear Chat</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
<div class="help-panel" id="helpPanel"></div>

<script src="/shared/marked.min.js"></script>
<script src="/shared/highlight.min.js"></script>
<script>
// ── Global safety ──
window.addEventListener('error',e=>console.error('[MAGI]',e.message,e.filename,e.lineno))
window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',e=>console.error('[MAGI] Promise:',e.reason))
function $(id){return document.getElementById(id)}
function $s(id,fn){const el=$(id);if(el)fn(el);return el}

marked.use({gfm:true,breaks:true})
const WSU=(location.protocol==='https:'?'wss://':'ws://')+location.host+'/ws/chat'
let A={},LO=[],ws=null,wsr=false,gen=false,curCard=null,curRaw='',mode='council',aa='rafael',cardEls=[],curMode='reasoning'
let INT={preset:'balanced',agents:{}},PRESETS={},MODS={}
let sessions=[],curSess=null,sidebarOpen=true
let selectedAgents=new Set() // agents selected for council/roundtable

// ── Init ──
;(async()=>{
  try{const r=await fetch('/api/agents'),d=await r.json();A=d.agents||{};LO=d.layerOrder||[];selectedAgents=new Set(Object.keys(A));buildViz()}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] agents:',e)}
  try{const r=await fetch('/api/intensity'),d=await r.json();INT={preset:d.preset||'balanced',agents:d.agents||{}};PRESETS=d.presets||{};MODS=d.modifiers||{}}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] intensity:',e)}
  try{await loadSessions()}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] sessions:',e)}
  try{connectWS()}catch(e){console.error('[MAGI] WS:',e);setTimeout(connectWS,2000)}
  document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape'){closeModeDD();closeSettings();if(helpOpen)toggleHelp()}})
  // Auto-create first session if none
  if(!sessions.length) await newSession()
})()

// ── WebSocket ──
function connectWS(){setWS('connecting');ws=new WebSocket(WSU)
ws.onopen=()=>{wsr=true;setWS('ok');toast('Connected')}
ws.onclose=()=>{wsr=false;setWS('');setTimeout(connectWS,3000)}
ws.onerror=()=>ws.close()
ws.onmessage=e=>{try{handleWS(JSON.parse(e.data))}catch(err){console.warn('[MAGI] WS msg:',err)}}}
function wsSend(o){if(ws?.readyState===1)ws.send(JSON.stringify(o))}
function setWS(s){
  $s('wsDot',d=>{d.className='tb-dot'+(s?' '+s:'')})
  $s('wsLabel',el=>{el.textContent=s==='ok'?'Online':s==='connecting'?'Connecting':'Offline'})}

function handleWS(m){switch(m.type){
  case'ping':wsSend({type:'pong'});break
  case'connected':case'ack':break
  case'intensity_update':INT=m.state||INT;break
  case'agent_start':{setVizState(m.agentId,'thinking');curRaw='';curCard=addAgentCard(m.agentId);setGen(true);break}
  case'chunk':if(curCard){curRaw+=m.chunk;setVizState(m.agentId,'speaking');const b=curCard.querySelector('.card-body');if(b)b.textContent=curRaw;scrollBottom()}break
  case'agent_done':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,m.text||curRaw,m.agentId);curCard=null;curRaw=''}
    setVizState(m.agentId,'idle');setGen(false);break
  case'rt_start':addSysMsg('Roundtable started — '+m.total+' agents');setGen(true);break
  case'rt_agent_start':{setVizState(m.agentId,'thinking');curRaw='';curCard=addAgentCard(m.agentId);break}
  case'rt_chunk':if(curCard){curRaw+=m.chunk;setVizState(m.agentId,'speaking');const b=curCard.querySelector('.card-body');if(b)b.textContent=curRaw;scrollBottom()}break
  case'rt_agent_done':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,m.text||curRaw,m.agentId);curCard=null;curRaw=''}
    setVizState(m.agentId,'idle');break
  case'rt_done':addSysMsg('Roundtable complete');setGen(false);clearVizStates();break
  case'stopped':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,curRaw);curCard=null;curRaw=''}setGen(false);break}}

// ── Sessions ──
async function loadSessions(){
  const r=await fetch('/api/sessions');sessions=await r.json();renderSessions()
}
function renderSessions(){
  const list=$('sessionList');if(!list)return;list.innerHTML=''
  const icons={council:'🏛',roundtable:'🔮',private:'💬'}
  sessions.forEach(s=>{
    const div=document.createElement('div');div.className='sb-sess'+(curSess?.id===s.id?' active':'')
    div.onclick=()=>openSession(s.id)
    const ago=timeAgo(s.updatedAt)
    div.innerHTML='<span class="sb-sess-icon">'+(icons[s.mode]||'💬')+'</span><div class="sb-sess-info"><div class="sb-sess-title">'+esc(s.title)+'</div><div class="sb-sess-meta">'+s.messageCount+' msgs · '+ago+'</div></div><button class="sb-sess-del" onclick="event.stopPropagation();deleteSession(\''+s.id+'\')" title="Delete">×</button>'
    list.appendChild(div)
  })
}
async function newSession(){
  const r=await fetch('/api/sessions',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({mode,title:'New Session'})})
  const d=await r.json();if(d.ok){sessions.unshift(d.session);curSess=d.session;renderSessions();clearCardsUI();updateTitle();$s('welcome',el=>{el.style.display=''})}
}
async function openSession(id){
  const r=await fetch('/api/sessions/'+id);const d=await r.json()
  if(!d.ok)return;curSess=d.session;renderSessions();clearCardsUI();updateTitle()
  $s('welcome',el=>{el.style.display=d.session.messages.length?'none':''})
  // Render saved messages
  for(const msg of d.session.messages||[]){
    if(msg.role==='user')addUserCard(msg.text,false)
    else if(msg.role==='agent'){const c=addAgentCard(msg.agentId,false);if(c)finCard(c,msg.text,msg.agentId)}
  }
  scrollBottom()
  // On mobile, close sidebar
  if(window.innerWidth<=768){sidebarOpen=false;$s('sidebar',el=>el.classList.add('collapsed'));$s('bottomWrap',el=>el.classList.add('full'))}
}
async function deleteSession(id){
  await fetch('/api/sessions/'+id,{method:'DELETE'})
  sessions=sessions.filter(s=>s.id!==id)
  if(curSess?.id===id){curSess=sessions[0]||null;if(curSess)openSession(curSess.id);else{clearCardsUI();$s('welcome',el=>{el.style.display=''})}}
  renderSessions();toast('Session deleted')
}
async function forkSession(){
  if(!curSess){toast('No session to fork');return}
  const r=await fetch('/api/sessions/'+curSess.id+'/fork',{method:'POST'})
  const d=await r.json();if(d.ok){sessions.unshift(d.session);openSession(d.session.id);toast('🌀 Session forked!')}
}
function updateTitle(){$s('tbTitle',el=>{el.textContent=curSess?.title||'New Session'})}

// ── Sidebar ──
function toggleSidebar(){
  sidebarOpen=!sidebarOpen
  $s('sidebar',el=>el.classList.toggle('collapsed',!sidebarOpen))
  $s('bottomWrap',el=>el.classList.toggle('full',!sidebarOpen))
  $s('sbToggle',el=>{el.textContent=sidebarOpen?'◀':'▶'})
  $s('tbHamburger',el=>el.classList.toggle('hidden',sidebarOpen))
}

// ── Mode Dropdown ──
const MODES=[
  {id:'council',icon:'🏛',name:'Council',desc:'All agents respond',color:'var(--primary)',dot:'var(--primary)'},
  {id:'roundtable',icon:'🔮',name:'Roundtable',desc:'Turn-based debate',color:'var(--warn)',dot:'var(--warn)'},
  {id:'private',icon:'💬',name:'Private',desc:'Chat with one agent',color:'var(--accent2)',dot:'var(--accent2)',sub:true}
]
function buildModeDD(){
  const dd=$('modeDD');if(!dd)return;dd.innerHTML=''
  const isPrivate=mode==='private'
  // Sticky section: 3 modes
  let sticky='<div class="dd-sticky">'
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='council'?' active':'')+'" onclick="pickMode(\'council\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--primary);color:var(--primary)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">🏛 Council</div><div class="dd-desc">All agents respond independently</div></div></div>'
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='roundtable'?' active':'')+'" onclick="pickMode(\'roundtable\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--warn);color:var(--warn)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">🔮 Roundtable</div><div class="dd-desc">All selected agents debate in turns</div></div></div>'
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='private'?' active':'')+'" onclick="showPrivateList()"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--accent2);color:var(--accent2)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">💬 Private'+(mode==='private'?' → '+((A[aa]||{}).name||aa):'')+'</div><div class="dd-desc">Chat 1-on-1 with a specific agent</div></div></div>'
  // Only show checkboxes when NOT in private mode
  if(!isPrivate){
    sticky+='<div class="dd-sep"></div>'
    sticky+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:2px 8px"><div class="dd-header" style="padding:0">Participating ('+selectedAgents.size+'/'+Object.keys(A).length+')</div>'
    sticky+='<span class="dd-select-all" onclick="toggleAllAgents()">Toggle All</span></div>'
  }
  sticky+='</div>'
  // Scrollable section
  let scroll='<div class="dd-scroll" id="ddScroll">'
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0))
  if(!isPrivate){
    // Checkboxes for council/roundtable
    for(const[id,a]of sorted){
      const checked=selectedAgents.has(id)?'checked':''
      scroll+='<label class="dd-agent-check"><input type="checkbox" '+checked+' onchange="toggleAgent(\''+id+'\',this.checked)"><span class="ac-dot" style="background:'+a.color+'"></span><span class="ac-name">'+a.name+'</span><span class="ac-role">'+(a.desc||a.role)+'</span></label>'
    }
  }
  // Private agent list
  scroll+='<div id="privateList" style="display:'+(isPrivate?'block':'none')+'">'
  if(!isPrivate)scroll+='<div class="dd-sep"></div>'
  scroll+='<div class="dd-header">Select agent for Private chat</div>'
  scroll+='<input class="dd-search" placeholder="Search agents..." oninput="filterAgents(this.value)">'
  for(const[id,a]of sorted){
    scroll+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='private'&&aa===id?' active':'')+'" data-name="'+a.name.toLowerCase()+'" onclick="pickAgent(\''+id+'\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><div><div class="dd-name">'+a.name+'</div><div class="dd-desc">'+(a.desc||a.role)+'</div></div></div>'
  }
  scroll+='</div></div>'
  dd.innerHTML=sticky+scroll
}
function showPrivateList(){
  mode='private'
  buildModeDD()
  const scroll=$('ddScroll');if(scroll)scroll.scrollTop=0
}
function toggleAgent(id,on){if(on)selectedAgents.add(id);else selectedAgents.delete(id);buildModeDD()}
function toggleAllAgents(){if(selectedAgents.size===Object.keys(A).length)selectedAgents.clear();else selectedAgents=new Set(Object.keys(A));buildModeDD()}
function toggleModeDD(){const d=$('modeDD');if(!d)return;const show=!d.classList.contains('show');if(show)buildModeDD();d.classList.toggle('show',show)}
function closeModeDD(){$s('modeDD',d=>d.classList.remove('show'))}
function filterAgents(q){q=q.toLowerCase();document.querySelectorAll('#modeDD .dd-scroll .dd-item[data-name]').forEach(i=>{i.style.display=i.dataset.name.includes(q)?'':'none'})}

function pickMode(id){
  mode=id;aa='rafael'
  const m=MODES.find(x=>x.id===id)
  $s('modeDot',el=>{el.style.background=m?.dot||'var(--primary)'})
  const cnt=selectedAgents.size
  $s('modeName',el=>{el.textContent=(m?.name||'Council')+(id!=='private'?' ('+cnt+')':'')})
  $s('inp',el=>{el.placeholder=id==='roundtable'?'Enter a topic for the roundtable...':'Ask the Council...'})
  if(cnt===0&&id!=='private')toast('⚠️ No agents selected — check some in the dropdown!')
  else{closeModeDD();toast(m?.icon+' '+m?.name+(id!=='private'?' — '+cnt+' agents':''))}
}
function pickAgent(id){
  mode='private';aa=id
  const a=A[id]||{name:id,color:'#888'}
  $s('modeDot',el=>{el.style.background=a.color})
  $s('modeName',el=>{el.textContent=a.name})
  $s('inp',el=>{el.placeholder='Chat privately with '+a.name+'...'})
  closeModeDD();toast('💬 Private → '+a.name)
}

// ── Send ──
function doSend(){
  const inp=$('inp');if(!inp)return
  const t=inp.value.trim();if(!t||!wsr||gen)return;inp.value='';autoGrow(inp)
  $s('welcome',el=>{el.style.display='none'})
  // Slash commands
  if(/^\/(visual|visualize|diagram|slides)\s+/.test(t)){const topic=t.replace(/^\/(visual|visualize|diagram|slides)\s+/,'');addUserCard(t);generateVisual(topic);return}
  addUserCard(t)
  const sid=curSess?.id||null
  const activeAgents=[...selectedAgents].sort((a,b)=>(A[a]?.order||0)-(A[b]?.order||0))
  if(mode==='roundtable'){
    if(!activeAgents.length){toast('Select at least 1 agent');return}
    wsSend({type:'roundtable',text:t,agents:activeAgents,sessionId:sid})
  } else if(mode==='council'){
    // Council: all selected agents respond independently (no debate context)
    if(!activeAgents.length){toast('Select at least 1 agent');return}
    wsSend({type:'council',text:t,agents:activeAgents,sessionId:sid})
  } else {
    wsSend({type:'message',text:t,agentId:aa,sessionId:sid})
  }
}
function doStop(){wsSend({type:'stop'})}
function onKey(e){if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();doSend()}}
function autoGrow(el){el.style.height='auto';el.style.height=Math.min(el.scrollHeight,120)+'px'}
function setGen(v){gen=v;$s('btnStop',el=>el.classList.toggle('show',v));$s('btnSend',el=>{el.disabled=v})}

// ── Cards ──
function addUserCard(text,animate=true){
  const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return
  const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card user'
  if(!animate)card.style.animation='none'
  card.innerHTML='<div class="card-head"><div class="card-dot" style="background:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)"></div><span class="card-name" style="color:var(--accent2)">You</span><span class="card-time">'+timeStr()+'</span></div><div class="card-body">'+esc(text)+'</div>'
  area.appendChild(card);if(animate)scrollBottom()
}
function addAgentCard(agentId,animate=true){
  const a=A[agentId]||{name:agentId,color:'#888',layer:'?'}
  const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return null
  const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card'
  if(!animate)card.style.animation='none'
  card.innerHTML='<div class="card-head"><div class="card-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><span class="card-name" style="color:'+a.color+'">'+a.name+'</span><span class="card-tag">'+a.layer+'</span><span class="card-time">'+timeStr()+'</span><div class="card-actions"><button class="card-act" onclick="saveCardToObsidian(this)" title="Save to Obsidian">📝</button><button class="card-act" onclick="visualizeCard(this)" title="Visualize">🎨</button><button class="card-act" onclick="copyCard(this)">Copy</button></div></div><div class="card-body'+(animate?' streaming':'')+'"></div>'
  area.appendChild(card);if(animate)scrollBottom()
  return card
}
function finCard(card,text,agentId){
  const body=card.querySelector('.card-body');if(!body)return
  body.classList.remove('streaming')
  try{body.innerHTML=marked.parse(text);body.querySelectorAll('pre code').forEach(b=>hljs.highlightElement(b))
  body.querySelectorAll('pre').forEach(pre=>{pre.style.position='relative';const cp=document.createElement('button');cp.className='cc';cp.textContent='Copy'
  cp.onclick=()=>{navigator.clipboard.writeText(pre.textContent.replace(/Copy$/,''));cp.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>cp.textContent='Copy',1500)};pre.appendChild(cp)})}catch{body.textContent=text}
  scrollBottom()
}
function addSysMsg(text){const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return;area.appendChild(Object.assign(document.createElement('div'),{className:'sys-msg',textContent:text}));scrollBottom()}
function copyCard(btn){const body=btn.closest('.card')?.querySelector('.card-body');if(body)navigator.clipboard.writeText(body.innerText).then(()=>{btn.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>btn.textContent='Copy',1500)})}
function clearCards(){clearCardsUI();toast('Chat cleared')}
function clearCardsUI(){$s('cardsArea',el=>{el.innerHTML=''});$s('welcome',el=>{el.style.display=''})}
function scrollBottom(){$s('chatScroll',w=>{w.scrollTop=w.scrollHeight})}

// ── Visual ──
async function visualizeCard(btn){
  const card=btn.closest('.card');const body=card?.querySelector('.card-body');if(!body)return
  const text=body.innerText;const name=card.querySelector('.card-name')?.textContent||'Agent'
  btn.textContent='⏳';btn.disabled=true
  const vf=document.createElement('div');vf.className='visual-frame'
  vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading">🎨 Generating visual...</div>'
  card.appendChild(vf);scrollBottom()
  try{const res=await fetch('/api/visual',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({topic:'Visualize: '+text.slice(0,500),context:name+': '+text})})
  const data=await res.json()
  if(data.ok&&data.url)vf.innerHTML='<div class="vf-bar"><span>🎨 Visual</span><a href="'+data.url+'" target="_blank">Open ↗</a></div><iframe src="'+data.url+'" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>'
  else vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading" style="color:var(--danger)">Failed: '+(data.error||'Unknown')+'</div>'
  }catch(err){vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading" style="color:var(--danger)">'+err.message+'</div>'}
  btn.textContent='🎨';btn.disabled=false;scrollBottom()
}
async function generateVisual(topic){
  const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return
  const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card'
  card.innerHTML='<div class="card-head"><div class="card-dot" style="background:var(--primary);color:var(--primary)"></div><span class="card-name" style="color:var(--primary)">Visual</span><span class="card-tag">VIS</span><span class="card-time">'+timeStr()+'</span></div><div class="visual-frame"><div class="visual-loading">🎨 '+esc(topic.slice(0,80))+'...</div></div>'
  area.appendChild(card);scrollBottom()
  try{const res=await fetch('/api/visual',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({topic})});const data=await res.json();const vf=card.querySelector('.visual-frame')
  if(data.ok&&data.url)vf.innerHTML='<div class="vf-bar"><span>🎨 Visual</span><a href="'+data.url+'" target="_blank">Open ↗</a></div><iframe src="'+data.url+'" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>'
  else vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading" style="color:var(--danger)">Failed: '+(data.error||'Unknown')+'</div>'
  }catch(err){card.querySelector('.visual-frame').innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading" style="color:var(--danger)">'+err.message+'</div>'}
  scrollBottom()
}
function promptVisual(){
  const ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='settings-overlay show'
  ov.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===ov)ov.remove()}
  ov.innerHTML='<div class="settings-panel" style="width:min(400px,90vw)"><div class="settings-title">🎨 Visual Explainer <button class="settings-close" onclick="this.closest(\'.settings-overlay\').remove()">×</button></div><textarea id="visTopic" rows="3" placeholder="e.g. DataFlow system architecture, OCR pipeline..." style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:10px;color:var(--text);font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;resize:none;outline:none"></textarea><button class="settings-btn" onclick="doVisual()" style="margin-top:10px">Generate</button></div>'
  document.body.appendChild(ov)
  setTimeout(()=>{const el=$('visTopic');if(el){el.focus();el.onkeydown=e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();doVisual()}}}},100)
  window._visOv=ov
}
function doVisual(){const t=$('visTopic')?.value?.trim();if(!t)return;window._visOv?.remove();generateVisual(t)}

// ── Settings ──
function openSettings(){$s('settingsOverlay',el=>el.classList.add('show'));buildPresets();buildIntAgents();buildReasoningModes()}
function closeSettings(){$s('settingsOverlay',el=>el.classList.remove('show'))}
function buildPresets(){
  const grid=$('presetGrid');if(!grid)return;grid.innerHTML=''
  const icons={full:'🔥',focus:'🎯',quiet:'🤫',balanced:'⚖️'}
  for(const[key,p]of Object.entries(PRESETS)){
    grid.innerHTML+='<div class="preset-card'+(INT.preset===key?' active':'')+'" onclick="applyPreset(\''+key+'\')"><div class="pc-icon">'+(icons[key]||'⚡')+'</div><div class="pc-name">'+p.label+'</div><div class="pc-desc">'+p.desc+'</div></div>'
  }
}
function buildIntAgents(){

  const w=$('intAgents');if(!w)return;w.innerHTML=''
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0))
  for(const[id,a]of sorted){
    const v=INT.agents[id]??5
    const row=document.createElement('div');row.className='settings-row'
    row.innerHTML='<label style="color:'+a.color+'">'+a.name+'</label><input type="range" min="1" max="10" value="'+v+'" oninput="INT.agents[\''+id+'\']=+this.value;INT.preset=\'custom\';this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value;this.nextElementSibling.style.color=intC(+this.value)"><span class="val" style="color:'+intC(v)+'">'+v+'</span>'
    w.appendChild(row)
  }
}
function buildReasoningModes(){
  const w=$('reasoningModes');if(!w)return;w.innerHTML=''
  const modes=[{id:'fast',icon:'⚡',name:'Fast'},{id:'reasoning',icon:'🧠',name:'Reasoning'},{id:'research',icon:'🔬',name:'Research'}]
  modes.forEach(m=>{
    w.innerHTML+='<button class="tool-pill'+(curMode===m.id?' active':'')+'" onclick="curMode=\''+m.id+'\';buildReasoningModes();toast(\'Mode: '+m.name+'\')">'+m.icon+' '+m.name+'</button>'
  })
}
function intC(v){return v<=2?'#64748B':v<=4?'#94A3B8':v<=6?'var(--primary)':v<=8?'var(--warn)':'var(--danger)'}
async function applyPreset(key){
  try{const r=await fetch('/api/intensity/preset',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({preset:key})});const d=await r.json();if(d.ok){INT=d.state;buildPresets();buildIntAgents();toast('Preset: '+PRESETS[key]?.label)}}catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message)}
}
async function saveSettings(){
  try{const r=await fetch('/api/intensity',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({agents:INT.agents,preset:INT.preset})});const d=await r.json();if(d.ok){INT=d.state;closeSettings();toast('Settings saved ✓')}}catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message)}
}

// ── Helpers ──
// ── Council Visualizer ──
function buildViz(){
  const strip=$('vizStrip');if(!strip)return
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0))
  strip.innerHTML=sorted.map(([id,a])=>{
    const initials=a.name.slice(0,2).toUpperCase()
    return `<div class="viz-agent" id="viz-${id}" data-agent="${id}" onclick="pickAgent('${id}')" title="${a.name} — ${a.desc||a.role}">
      <div class="viz-avatar" style="background:${a.color}">${initials}<div class="viz-status"></div></div>
      <div class="viz-bubble"></div>
      <div class="viz-name">${a.name}</div>
    </div>`
  }).join('')
}
function setVizState(agentId,state){
  // state: 'idle' | 'thinking' | 'speaking'
  const el=$('viz-'+agentId);if(!el)return
  el.classList.remove('speaking','thinking')
  if(state==='speaking')el.classList.add('speaking')
  else if(state==='thinking')el.classList.add('thinking')
  const bubble=el.querySelector('.viz-bubble')
  if(bubble){
    if(state==='thinking')bubble.textContent='thinking...'
    else if(state==='speaking')bubble.textContent='speaking'
    else bubble.textContent=''
  }
}
function clearVizStates(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.viz-agent').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('speaking','thinking'))
}
function setThinking(agentId,on){setVizState(agentId,on?'thinking':'idle')}
function timeStr(){return new Date().toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}
function timeAgo(ts){if(!ts)return '';const d=Date.now()-ts;if(d<60000)return 'just now';if(d<3600000)return Math.floor(d/60000)+'m ago';if(d<86400000)return Math.floor(d/3600000)+'h ago';return Math.floor(d/86400000)+'d ago'}
function esc(s){const d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=s;return d.innerHTML}
function toast(m){const t=$('toast');if(!t)return;t.textContent=m;t.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(t._t);t._t=setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2500)}

// Click outside close
document.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(!e.target.closest('#modeBtn')&&!e.target.closest('#modeDD'))closeModeDD()})

// ── Help Panel ──

    helpOpen=!helpOpen

  const layers={L1:'Intelligence',L2:'Strategy',L3:'Guard Rails',L4:'Blueprint',L5:'Core Council'}
  const byLayer={}
  for(const[id,a]of Object.entries(A)){
    const l=a.layer||'?';if(!byLayer[l])byLayer[l]=[];byLayer[l].push({id,...a})
  }
  const layerList=LO.length?LO:['L1','L2','L3','L4','L5']
  for(const l of layerList){
    if(!byLayer[l])continue
    html+='<div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text4);margin:10px 0 4px;letter-spacing:1px">'+l+' · '+(layers[l]||'')+'</div>'
    byLayer[l].sort((a,b)=>(a.order||0)-(b.order||0)).forEach(a=>{
      html+='<div class="help-card"><div class="help-card-head"><div class="help-card-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><span class="help-card-name" style="color:'+a.color+'">'+a.name+'</span><span class="help-card-role">'+a.role+'</span></div><div class="help-card-desc">'+a.desc+'</div></div>'
    })
  }

  // Slash commands
  html+='<div class="help-section">Slash Commands</div>'
  const cmds=[
    {cmd:'/visual <topic>',desc:'Generate a visual diagram or chart'},
    {cmd:'/visualize <topic>',desc:'Same as /visual'},
    {cmd:'/diagram <topic>',desc:'Generate a Mermaid.js diagram'},
    {cmd:'/slides <topic>',desc:'Generate a slide deck'},
  ]
  cmds.forEach(c=>{
    html+='<div class="help-feature"><div class="help-feature-icon" style="font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;color:var(--accent2)">/</div><div class="help-feature-info"><div class="help-feature-name" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px">'+c.cmd+'</div><div class="help-feature-desc">'+c.desc+'</div></div></div>'
  })

  panel.innerHTML=html
  }catch(e){console.error('[MAGI] buildHelp error:',e)}
}

// ── Obsidian Save ──
async function saveCardToObsidian(btn){
  const card=btn.closest('.card');if(!card)return
  const name=card.querySelector('.card-name')?.textContent||'Agent'
  const body=card.querySelector('.card-body')?.innerText||''
  if(!body){toast('Nothing to save');return}
  btn.textContent='⏳';btn.disabled=true
  try{
    const res=await fetch('/api/obsidian/save',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({title:name+' — '+(body.slice(0,50).replace(/\n/g,' ')),agent:name,text:body,tags:['magi','council',name.toLowerCase()]})})
    const d=await res.json()
    if(d.ok){toast('📝 Saved to Obsidian');btn.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>{btn.textContent='📝';btn.disabled=false},2000)}
    else{toast('Error: '+(d.error||'Failed'));btn.textContent='📝';btn.disabled=false}
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message);btn.textContent='📝';btn.disabled=false}
}
async function saveSessionToObsidian(){
  if(!curSess?.id){toast('No active session');return}
  try{
    const res=await fetch('/api/obsidian/save-session',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({sessionId:curSess.id})})
    const d=await res.json()
    if(d.ok)toast('📝 Session saved to Obsidian: '+d.path)
    else toast('Error: '+(d.error||'Failed'))
  }catch(e){toast('Error: '+e.message)}
}
